'''Susuax''' was a manufacturing company.<ref name="BFH" /> The company was in operation during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]<ref name="GFT">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref> and the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. One of their well known and successful tools was the [[Verti-Go Climbing System]].<ref name="BFH" />
